recommendations.text: 8 review-worthy process(es) have no owner lane. These are the only automatic cleanup stop-plan candidates.
20 review-worthy process(es) already have owner lanes. Route them to the owning agent before any cleanup plan.
23 shell or dev run candidate(s) are older than the stale threshold: 3 owner-unknown, 20 lane-owned, 0 registered-owned.
1 process(es) exceed the high-memory threshold: 1 owner-unknown, 0 lane-owned, 0 registered-owned. Do not start memory-heavy jobs until reviewed.
5 process(es) have parents that are not visible in the current process table: 4 owner-unknown, 1 lane-owned, 0 registered-owned.
8 review-worthy process(es) still have no agent lane owner. Claim before cleanup.
220 process(es) inherited an owner lane from visible agent surfaces or process ancestors.
